description: Analyze the crystal packing of porcine insulin (PDB: 4INS). Generate symmetry mates to visualize the crystal lattice. Create a publication-quality figure highlighting the original molecule and its symmetry mates (save to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/insulin_packing.png). Write a plain-text report to ~/PyMOL_Data/insulin_crystal_report.txt containing the crystallographic space group, unit cell dimensions (a, b, c), and a list of at least 5 residues involved in crystal contacts (between the original molecule and symmetry mates).
